activities_projects.title: Disaster Impact Report
activities_projects.objective: Analyse the social impact of the cyclone
steps: Study the effects of the cyclone described in the lesson
Write a short report explaining the destruction caused
Include examples from the text

activities_projects.title: Leadership Case Study
steps: Identify actions taken by Prashant
Explain how these actions show leadership
Write a short analysis

activities_projects.title: Survival Strategies
activities_projects.objective: Evaluate survival methods used by villagers
steps: Identify survival strategies used in the shelter
Explain how these strategies helped people survive

activities_projects.title: Community Rehabilitation Plan
activities_projects.objective: Design a plan for rebuilding the village
steps: Imagine you are part of the rescue team
Create a plan with five steps to rebuild the village

activities_projects.title: Role of Youth in Disasters
activities_projects.objective: Analyse the contribution of young people
steps: Write a paragraph explaining how youth can help during disasters
Give examples from the story

activities_projects.title: Emotional Impact Study
activities_projects.objective: Understand the emotional effects of disasters
steps: Identify emotional struggles faced by villagers
Explain how they coped with grief

activities_projects.title: Title Justification
activities_projects.objective: Interpret the significance of the title
steps: Think about the meaning of the title
Write a paragraph explaining why it is suitable

activities_projects.title: Disaster Management Discussion
steps: Write five measures that can reduce disaster damage
Explain how each measure helps

activities_projects.title: Alternative Ending
steps: Imagine a different ending for the story
Write a short paragraph describing it

activities_projects.title: Theme Analysis
activities_projects.objective: Identify the central theme of the story
steps: Identify the main themes in the story
Explain how the story highlights these themes
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands deeper meaning of the text
